creator: cracauer@cons.org
text:
Stefan Walter wrote on Wed, Jan 07, 2009 at 10:07:20PM +0100: 
> Martin Cracauer, 23.12.08, 17:37h CET:
> 
> > I verified that the 6.3 build works even on 8.0-amd64.  I think we
> > should commit a simple update to 19e first and then make a revision.
> 
> OK. Can you (Martin or Fulvio) send a patch with the intended changes for
> the update?

I did not make a patch with the version switch mechanism.

What I did is just use the 6.3 build everywhere.

Martin
